title: Kaldurg Fort
tagline: Kaldurg Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Kaldurg Fort is east of Palghar, Maharashtra, India, in the Sahyadri mountain range of northern Konkan.
overview.description: Kaldurg Fort is east of Palghar, Maharashtra, India, in the Sahyadri mountain range of northern Konkan. Its height is at least 475 meters above sea level, giving views of the Arabian Sea and the industrial town of Palghar to the west, as well as views of the Surya River, to the east. This rectangular shape of a fort can easily be located from a distance. There is no historic sign.

topPlaces.name: Palghar
topPlaces.description: Palghar () is a prominent town in the Konkan division of Maharashtra state, India, and a municipal council. It is strategically located within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and has been the administrative capital of the Palghar district since 2014.

topPlaces.name: Surya River (India)
topPlaces.description: The Surya River is a river in located in the Palghar district of Maharashtra. It is located 95.8 kilometres (59.5 mi) north of Mumbai the capital of the state.

topPlaces.name: Bahadoli
topPlaces.description: Bahadoli is a village in the Palghar taluka of Palghar district located in Maharashtra State, India.

topPlaces.name: Umroli
topPlaces.description: Umroli is a town in Maharashtra. It also has a railway station on the western Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway.

topPlaces.name: New Manor Town
topPlaces.description: New Manor Town is an affordable housing project in the town of Manor, India. The housing complex is near the industrial towns of Palghar and Boisar.

items.note: Palghar () is a prominent town in the Konkan division of Maharashtra state, India, and a municipal council. It is strategically located within the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and has been the administrative capital of the Palghar district since 2014.
The Surya River is a river in located in the Palghar district of Maharashtra. It is located 95.8 kilometres (59.5 mi) north of Mumbai the capital of the state.
Bahadoli is a village in the Palghar taluka of Palghar district located in Maharashtra State, India.
Umroli is a town in Maharashtra. It also has a railway station on the western Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway.
New Manor Town is an affordable housing project in the town of Manor, India. The housing complex is near the industrial towns of Palghar and Boisar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kaldurg Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kaldurg Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kaldurg Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kaldurg Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kaldurg Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kaldurg Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kaldurg Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kaldurg Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palghar, Surya River (India), Bahadoli, Umroli, New Manor Town.
